case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JOSE ALFREDO CONTRERAS SANDOVAL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NARALLANI SANCHEZ, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, JOSE ALFREDO CONTRERAS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, JOSE ALFREDO CONTRERAS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, JOSE ALFREDO CONTRERAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED FEB-10-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, JOSE ALFREDO CONTRERAS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE ALFREDO CONTRERAS SANDOVAL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
